title: C Memory Outcomes, Evidence, and Toolchain Boundaries · Undefined-Behavior Triage
summary: An incident responder inherits a corrupted memory-safety evidence and transfer matrix, the earliest failing input, and two plausible hypotheses; they must preserve first-failure evidence, repair the cause, and add a regression. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in memory-safety evidence and transfer matrix and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence de…
objectives: Separate deterministic browser practice from C23 compiler, sanitizer, ABI, concurrency, fuzz, load, and production evidence.
Pin ISO/IEC 9899:2024, reviewed implementation support, diagnostics, extensions, and target ABI as a compatibility contract.
Trace source, preprocessing, translation, linking, loading, execution, and observable output without collapsing their failure layers.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Transfer Evidence Plan
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug native-systems team handles memory case 6588. Produce bounded C evidence to separate browser evidence from native transfer evidence; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate deterministic browser practice from C23 compiler, sanitizer, ABI, concurrency, fuzz, load, and production evidence.

Inspect the Transfer Evidence Plan trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Transfer Evidence Plan.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Evidence Limits
steps.instruction:
For this debug demonstration of cmem-evidence-limits, write the complete compile-ready C program headed "/* Evidence: cmem-evidence-limits-tjk5r1 */" for changed case 6202. It must separate browser evidence from native transfer evidence, reject one changed boundary, print an observable result and invariant, and return nonzero when the invariant fails. Keep instant code within the PicoC 3.2.2 practice subset; do not claim C23, optimizing compiler, sanitizer, ABI, thread, operating-system, FFI, load, or production evidence until its explicit controlled transfer gate passes.

For Publish the incident record · Debug Evidence Limits, challenge the documented misconception with changed-size, failure-injection, printed invariant, compiler, sanitizer, analyzer, fuzz, ABI, concurrency, or production-transfer evidence: One clean sanitizer run proves absence of memory defects.
